commit.message: feat: add PWA support
docs: update README with accurate feature list and deployment info
fix: i18n indentation for ml_ and auth_ keys
fix: i18n for auth errors and forgot password
fix: replace forgot password email with admin contact info
fix: add starttls.required=true for Gmail SMTP
fix: switch SMTP to port 465 SSL
feat: switch email back to JavaMail SMTP
fix: leaveLeague res2.json() typo
fix: restore forgot/reset password in AuthPanel
fix: Transactional for myLeagues and leaderboard
fix: show all rooms after create/join, auto-select
fix: fetch leagues on mount
fix: i18n error messages for Mini League
feat: Mini League i18n support
fix: use String principal in MiniLeagueController
fix: MiniLeague dark mode styling
feat: switch email to Resend API
feat: add forgot/reset password
chore: remove unused Flyway dependency and render.yaml
chore: remove unused Flyway migrations
feat: add Mini League feature
fix: allow all vercel.app domains in CORS
fix: add ddl-auto=update
fix: upgrade Flyway to 11.8.2 for PostgreSQL 18 support
add Dockerfile for Render deploy
chore: migrate to PostgreSQL, ready for Render + Vercel deploy
Add match detail page (half-time score, venue, referees)
Refactor frontend into components; add Vietnamese/English UI toggle
Add prediction history page; rewrite README in English
Them hieu ung UI: chuyen tab muot, hover nang hang, huy chuong nay, skeleton loading
Them tinh nang du doan ket qua tran dau; fix migration V3 idempotent
Fix: /error bi Security chan lam sai lech ma loi that (401/409 thanh 403); bat message loi
Redesign UI: navbar gradient, vung mau BXH, huy chuong vua pha luoi, font Be Vietnam Pro
Them 37 test JUnit; nang Mockito/ByteBuddy cho JDK 25
Them so sanh 2 doi, tim kiem, dark mode; an doi hinh (API free khong co) va hien mau ao/website
Cap nhat README: vua pha luoi, phan quyen USER/ADMIN, roadmap
Them phan loai nguoi dung (Role USER/ADMIN) + trang quan tri
Them tinh nang Vua pha luoi (top scorers) cho moi giai
Chuyen schema sang Flyway migration; cap nhat README

Chuyen ddl-auto sang validate: schema.sql lam nguon chinh

Hibernate chi kiem tra bang khop entity, khong tu tao/sua nua.
Da test: tao DB moi tu backend/db/schema.sql roi chay app voi validate
-> boot sach, khong loi schema-validation.

Them backend/db/schema.sql: luoc do 4 bang co comment de tu execute

Mo ta bang tay 4 bang (app_user, favorite_team, match_fixture,
sent_notification) tuong duong voi cac entity Hibernate tu tao,
phuc vu hoc tap / tai lieu / khoi tao schema thu cong.

Them lich thi dau, chi tiet doi, JWT auth, doi yeu thich, job dong bo & email

Backend (Spring Boot):
- Lich thi dau & ket qua: GET /api/matches/{code}/upcoming|results (cache 5 phut)
- Chi tiet doi bong: GET /api/teams/{id}
- Xac thuc JWT: /api/auth/register|login (BCrypt), Spring Security bao ve /api/favorites
- Doi yeu thich: GET/POST/DELETE /api/favorites, luu SQL Server (JPA)
- Job @Scheduled dong bo tran vao DB + gui email nhac doi yeu thich sap thi dau
- Swagger/OpenAPI co nut Authorize

Frontend (React + Bootstrap):
- Tab lich thi dau/ket qua, trang chi tiet doi, form dang nhap/dang ky
- Nut theo doi doi, trang doi yeu thich, giu dang nhap qua localStorage
- Chuyen toan bo UI sang Bootstrap
Initial commit: Football Stats Tracker (Spring Boot + React)
